'''tamojo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:miaul|miaul]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| t-m-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:miaul|miaul]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| tamojo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:tæmejeth|tæmejeth]] || [[word:tæmejej|tæmejej]] || [[word:tæmejesh|tæmejesh]] || [[word:tæmeje|tæmeje]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:tamomojoth|tamomojoth]] || [[word:tamomojoj|tamomojoj]] || [[word:tamomojosh|tamomojosh]] || [[word:tamomojo|tamomojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tamojoth|tamojoth]] || [[word:tamojoj|tamojoj]] || [[word:tamojosh|tamojosh]] || [[word:tamojo|tamojo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tamofjoth|tamofjoth]] || [[word:tamofjoj|tamofjoj]] || [[word:tamofjosh|tamofjosh]] || [[word:tamofjof|tamofjof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:tamojotho|tamojotho]] || [[word:tamojojo|tamojojo]] || [[word:tamojosho|tamojosho]] || [[word:tamojoko|tamojoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:tamojoth|tamojoth]] || [[word:tamojoj|tamojoj]] || [[word:tamojosh|tamojosh]] || [[word:tamojo|tamojo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:tamojothol|tamojothol]] || [[word:tamojojol|tamojojol]] || [[word:tamojoshol|tamojoshol]] || [[word:tamojokol|tamojokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:tamojothotho|tamojothotho]] || [[word:tamojojojo|tamojojojo]] || [[word:tamojoshosho|tamojoshosho]] || [[word:tamojoko|tamojoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:tamojothon|tamojothon]] || [[word:tamojojon|tamojojon]] || [[word:tamojoshon|tamojoshon]] || [[word:tamojokon|tamojokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:tamojothoro|tamojothoro]] || [[word:tamojojoro|tamojojoro]] || [[word:tamojoshoro|tamojoshoro]] || [[word:tamojokoro|tamojokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|386eaa0}}
